question: What is the primary benefit of Dataset.prefetch()?
answer: Reduces idle time via preprocessing overlap
explanation: prefetch() overlaps preprocessing and model execution, reducing idle time. cache() handles memory, shuffle() randomizes, filtering requires separate ops.

options.text: Reduces idle time via preprocessing overlap
Caches entire dataset in memory for speed

question: Why use tf.GradientTape.watch() in a custom training loop?
answer: To compute gradients of a non-trainable tensor
explanation: GradientTape tracks tf.Variables only by default. watch() extends tracking to arbitrary Tensors for gradient computation.

options.text: To compute gradients of a non-trainable tensor
To update weights of the model layers
To apply gradients from the optimizer step
